topics.title: How Losing ‘Avengers’ Brought Destin Daniel Cretton to Spider-Man: Brand New Day
topics.angle: Director Destin Daniel Cretton discusses the creative pivot from helming an 'Avengers' film to taking on 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' after the fallout from the 'Kang' storyline.

sources.headline: How Losing ‘Avengers’ Brought Destin Daniel Cretton to Spider-Man: Brand New Day
sources.summary: The first filmmaker to direct both a Marvel and a Sony film in the Marvel Cinematic Universe tells IndieWire about the finer details of Peter Parker's current lot in life, the "Kang" fallout, and why this one is so personal.

topics.title: Tyler Perry’s ‘Beauty in Black’ Renewed for Season 4 at Netflix
topics.angle: Tyler Perry's 'Beauty in Black' surprisingly renewed for Season 4 by Netflix.

sources.headline: Tyler Perry’s ‘Beauty in Black’ Renewed for Season 4 at Netflix
sources.summary: The drama was initially set to end with the upcoming third season.

sources.headline: Tyler Perry s Beauty in Black Gets Surprise Season 4 Renewal After Final Season Announcement
sources.summary: It turns out Tyler Perry s Netflix series Beauty in Black will be back for Season 4 after all. Netflix has announced that the show is returning for a fourth season despite the fact that a third and final season was announced in December 2025. That season does not yet have a release date at the [ ]

topics.title: The Roost Podcast Network Relaunches as Podium, Signs Trisha Paytas for New Show

sources.summary: EXCLUSIVE: The Roost Podcast Network is relaunching as Podium, a video-first business that debuts with a Trisha Paytas deal in the pocket.
